productName: SamStep74 A1 Suite Local ANT egress policy
guardrails: Keep outbound network off by default; loopback remains allowed for local-first IPC.
Keep external egress deny-until-listed: ARMOSPHERA_ONE_ALLOW_EGRESS=1 is not enough without an explicit host allowlist.
Keep OpenRouter gated by the same global egress flag and openrouter.ai allowlist entry.
Keep server/aiProvider.js and server/openNotebook.js using injected safeFetch/config gates; do not bypass them with direct fetch calls.
Do not introduce new cloud AI providers, secret reads, telemetry, or external fetches outside safeFetch.
Preserve A1_STUDIO_* aliases and local bge-m3/Ollama defaults for portable self-hosted deployments.
